name: Bates College
meets_full_need_notes: Bates meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students.
no_loan_notes: Bates includes loans in aid packages, though the loan component is modest. Bates has not eliminated loans entirely but caps student loan expectations.

merit_thresholds.notes: Bates offers limited merit scholarships (e.g., Bobcat Scholarships) for outstanding students. Merit aid is not the primary focus; most aid is need-based.

ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same need-based aid calculations. Binding commitment expected only after reviewing aid award; students may withdraw if aid is insufficient.
appeal_policy: Appeals accepted when family financial circumstances change. Students submit documentation to financial aid office for reconsideration.
